# Brownfield Migration Spec — a customer onboarding and KYC application on JBoss 7

## Application Summary
a customer onboarding and KYC application on JBoss 7

## Modernization Scope
all three integrations are in scope

## Integration Inventory

### Integration: INT-001 — Onboarding UI
- **Technology + version:** Angular 12 on JBoss 7
- **Integration type:** sync api
- **Data flow direction:** bidirectional
- **Criticality:** high
- **Coexistence constraint:** hard-cutover
- **API surface / contract:** internal pages
- **State management:** session sticky
- **Data volume + SLA:** 500K sessions/day p95 < 600ms
- **Target intent:** SPA on CloudFront
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

### Integration: INT-002 — KYC orchestration
- **Technology + version:** Camunda 7 on JBoss 7
- **Integration type:** sync api
- **Data flow direction:** bidirectional
- **Criticality:** critical
- **Coexistence constraint:** dual-read
- **API surface / contract:** internal REST documented
- **State management:** stateful workflow
- **Data volume + SLA:** 300K cases/day p95 < 900ms
- **Target intent:** Step Functions on AWS
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

### Integration: INT-003 — Identity verification vendor
- **Technology + version:** REST client to vendor v2
- **Integration type:** sync api
- **Data flow direction:** read-only
- **Criticality:** high
- **Coexistence constraint:** dual-read
- **API surface / contract:** OpenAPI 3.0 documented
- **State management:** stateless
- **Data volume + SLA:** 250K verifications/day p95 < 1200ms
- **Target intent:** API Gateway + Lambda client
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->
